rationale: Candidate f503b93e42d4bd6bfe4214123317c67b9b86637f is the only one that correctly preserves all Gist components and headings. The 'current' and 'qwen' candidates are missing several Gist components (e.g., under 'Uploading multiple files' and 'Recursive Retry Helper') and have empty titles in the frontmatter. This candidate provides a high-quality, natural Hindi translation while maintaining the technical structure of the MDX file.
